name: daily-digest
prompt: Read all files in vault/learnings/ that exist. For each file, read its YAML frontmatter. Summarize: (1) total learnings count, (2) any patterns with recurrence-count >= 2 that are approaching promotion, (3) any feature requests (type: feature_request). Write the summary to vault/daily/ with today's date as filename (YYYY-MM-DD.md). Be concise.
